title: This Founder Wants You To Stop Hiring Humans — Meet Jaspar, CEO of Artisan

source.description:
Artisan is the SF startup building human-like AI employees to replace your bloated GTM stack — and kickstart the next Industrial Revolution while they’re at it.

Here’s what they’ve done so far:

- Raised $35M+ (Series A)
- Hit $6M ARR in 1.5 years
- Landed customers like CookUnity, Quora, SumUp
- Backed by YC, HubSpot Ventures, Day One, and more

In this convo, you’ll learn:

- Why AI avatars are already outperforming humans (no, seriously)
- Artisan’s scrappy growth playbook: 2 people, viral impact
- How Jaspar raised $35M in under a year
- Why they’re building in SF, not London
- How he hires, thinks, and lives big

Bonus:

_ A convo with Tina, Artisan’s Chief of Staff & Growth Lead, on how she landed a leadership role in her early 20s and broke into the AI space
- A convo with Sam, Artisan's CPO on what it’s like leading engineers as a female founder in AI
- And yes, just how insane the view from the Artisan house is

Fasten your seatbelt. This one’s wild.

Learn more about Artisan: https://www.artisan.co

Connect with Jaspar on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jaspar-carmichael-jack/
Connect with Tina on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tinasang/
Connect with Sam on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samantha12345/
Connect with Dasha on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dashashunina/ 

Want to sponsor the next episode of Talks With Dasha? Reach out: dariashunina@yahoo.com. 

Timecodes:

00:00 - A few facts about Jaspar, and Artisan
00:06 - Living together with your employees in one house?! Artisan's team culture
00:10 - London vs. San Francisco
00:15 - How to join Artisan's team, hiring lessons from Jaspar
00:19 - What Jaspar hates about himself
00:22 - Running high-impact campaigns with a 2-person team. Tina joins the conversation
00:26 - The secret behind the Stop Hiring Humans Campaign, and other cringe billboards
00:30 - Getting followers on LinkedIn
00:36 - How not to fight as co-founders. Sam joins the conversation
00:39 - Talking to users, and if the customers' feedback really matters 
00:44 - Pivoting from engineering into products, lessons from Sam
00:48 - Talking about women breaking into tech
00:50 - Meet Tina, Chief of Staff and Growth lead at Artisan in her early 20-s
00:52 - Landing your dream job
00:57 - Self-evaluation, am I doing good?
00:58 - Bay Area magic

theme.summary: This transcript is fundamentally focused on entrepreneurship, business strategy, and company building. The entire conversation covers Jasper's entrepreneurial journey building Artisan, extensively discussing core business concepts including: startup founding and scaling, fundraising ($35M raised), team building and hiring philosophy, company culture development, go-to-market strategies through viral marketing campaigns, customer acquisition, business model development (AI BDR automation), pricing strategies, competitive positioning, and practical business advice on everything from organizational structure to marketing ROI. While it touches on AI and technology (AI agents, BDR automation), these are explored through the lens of business strategy and building a successful company. The discussion covers practical business topics like billboard campaign ROI, team management, company culture (including the Artisan House concept), hiring strategies, and scaling from startup to growth stage. This aligns perfectly with the existing business category which already contains extensive content on entrepreneurship, startup strategy, business models, venture capital, and company building frameworks from other successful founders and business leaders.
